trans-unit.note: Bundle name

trans-unit.source: FoodTracker needs access to your camera to scan food barcodes
trans-unit.note: Privacy - Camera Usage Description
trans-unit.target: FoodTracker необходим доступ к вашей камере для сканирования штрих-кодов продуктов питания

trans-unit.source: FoodTracker needs access to your Health data to read active energy burned. This allows us to accurately calculate and adjust your daily calorie goals based on your activity.
trans-unit.note: Privacy - Health Share Usage Description
trans-unit.target: FoodTracker необходим доступ к вашим данным о здоровье, чтобы считывать сожженную активную энергию. Это позволяет нам точно рассчитывать и корректировать ваши ежедневные цели по калориям в зависимости от вашей активности.

trans-unit.source: FoodTracker needs access to your Health data to automatically sync your logged water intake and consumed calories, keeping all your health data centralized
trans-unit.note: Privacy - Health Update Usage Description
trans-unit.target: FoodTracker необходим доступ к вашим данным о здоровье, чтобы автоматически синхронизировать зарегистрированное потребление воды и потребленные калории, сохраняя при этом все данные о вашем здоровье централизованно.

trans-unit.source: This identifier will be used to deliver personalized ads to you and improve analytics.
trans-unit.note: Privacy - Tracking Usage Description
trans-unit.target: Этот идентификатор будет использоваться для показа вам персонализированной рекламы и улучшения аналитики.

trans-unit.note: A label showing the exact amount of a macronutrient in a serving size, followed by a slash and the total recommended amount. The argument is the amount of a macronutrient in a serving size. The second argument
A label displaying a numerical value with one decimal place. The argument is a floating-point number.
A text view displaying a nutrition value with its unit. The value is formatted to one decimal place.

A label showing the current value and a target value with a unit of measurement. The first argument is the current value, formatted to one decimal place. The second argument is the target value, formatted as an integer. The third argument is the unit of measurement.

A label displaying a percentage and a corresponding amount of a specific macronutrient. The argument is the percentage of the macronutrient in the diet, the second argument is the amount of that macronutrient in grams.
A text displaying a numerical value with a unit of measurement. The first argument is the numerical value. The second argument is the unit of measurement.
A label displaying the user's projected weight change over the next week. The value is formatted to two decimal places.
A label showing the amount of water consumed in liters. The argument is the string “%.2f”.
A label displaying the number of calories in a meal. The argument is the number of calories in the meal.
A label displaying the total number of calories in a recipe. The argument is the total number of calories in the recipe.
A text displaying a numerical value followed by a unit of measurement. The first argument is the numerical value. The second argument is the unit of measurement.
A label displaying the number of calories in a given recipe. The argument is the number of calories in the recipe.
A title and a description that explain the meaning of a user's daily streak. The argument is the number of days in a user's current streak.
A subtitle below the "Awards" header that shows the number of achievements the user has unlocked.
A label displaying the weight of one serving of a recipe. The argument is the total weight of the recipe divided by the number of servings.
Labels displaying the number of calories and cooking time for a recipe.
A small text displaying the nutritional information of an ingredient, including its calorie count and weight. The first argument is the calorie count. The second argument is the weight in grams.
A sublabel showing the number of calories and the weight of the food item, with a separator. The first argument is the number of calories. The second argument is the weight of the food item.
A row in the food search results showing the calorie count and a note about which diet it's best for or if it should be avoided.
A label showing how many more or fewer calories you need to consume to reach your daily target.
A label displaying the cooking time of a recipe. The argument is the cooking time of the recipe.
A text label displaying the reading time of a given article. The argument is the reading time of the article.
A text showing the number of completed and total tasks in a category.
A label showing how many more or fewer calories you need to consume to reach your daily target.
A label displaying the number of servings and a person icon.
A label displaying the current and total weight of a macro nutrient, separated by a slash. The first argument is the current weight. The second argument is the total weight.
Значения оси указывают на количество литров воды, затраченное за период.
A label displaying the estimated amount of protein in a recommended dish. The argument is the estimated protein content of the recommended dish.
A view displaying the cooking time of a recipe. The argument is the cooking time in minutes.
A small text displaying the percentage of the total calories attributed to a specific meal. The argument is the percentage, rounded to the nearest whole number.
A minus sign.
A text showing the daily water goal alongside the current water amount. The first argument is the current water amount in liters. The second argument is the daily water goal in liters.
A title for the 7-day burn trend section.

trans-unit.id: A new version of FoodTracker is available.
trans-unit.source: A new version of FoodTracker is available.

trans-unit.id: A simple balanced breakfast like eggs and avocado is perfect.
trans-unit.source: A simple balanced breakfast like eggs and avocado is perfect.
trans-unit.target: Простой сбалансированный завтрак, такой как яйца и авокадо, идеален.

trans-unit.note: A label indicating that a diet plan is currently active.
The title of the AI Coach feature.
The title of the section that presents the AI Coach's nutritional advice.
The title of the view that displays the analysis of a restaurant's menu using AI.

trans-unit.id: AI is analyzing your meal... Calculating macros 🪄
trans-unit.source: AI is analyzing your meal... Calculating macros 🪄
trans-unit.target: ИИ анализирует твой приём пищи... Рассчитывает макронутриенты 🪄

trans-unit.id: AI is reading the menu... Finding the best options 🕵️‍♂️
trans-unit.source: AI is reading the menu... Finding the best options 🕵️‍♂️
trans-unit.target: ИИ читает меню... Находит лучшие варианты 🕵️‍♂️

trans-unit.note: Заголовок экрана "Академия"
A heading that describes the active calories burned by the user.
A subheading below the user's name, showing their active daily calorie goal. The argument is the user's active daily calorie goal.
A heading that lists different sources of activity.
A tab label for the "Add" tab in the main view.
A button that, when tapped, presents a view for adding a new food item to a meal.
A placeholder text in the "Add an item" field of the shopping list.

trans-unit.id: Add basic information about the recipe.
trans-unit.source: Add basic information about the recipe.
trans-unit.note: A description of the first step in the recipe creation process.

trans-unit.id: Add more weight entries to see your trend over time.
trans-unit.source: Add more weight entries to see your trend over time.
trans-unit.target: Добавьте больше записей о весе, чтобы увидеть динамику изменений.

trans-unit.id: Add spinach, nuts, or salmon to your next meal to easily hit these goals.
trans-unit.source: Add spinach, nuts, or salmon to your next meal to easily hit these goals.
trans-unit.note: A suggestion within the micronutrients focus card, encouraging the user to add certain foods to their diet to meet their nutritional goals.
trans-unit.target: Добавьте шпинат, орехи или лосось в свой следующий прием пищи, чтобы легко достичь этих целей.

trans-unit.id: Add step-by-step directions for the cooking process.
trans-unit.source: Add step-by-step directions for the cooking process.
trans-unit.note: A prompt instructing the user to add step-by-step directions for a recipe.
A button label that says "Add to" followed by the name of the current meal (e.g. "Add to Breakfast").
A label displaying the calorie count of the selected items in the cart. The argument is the calorie count of the selected items.
A text that appears when the user's macro percentages are not 100%. It prompts them to adjust them.
A stepper that lets the user select their age.

trans-unit.id: All your steps, gym sessions, and Apple Watch workouts are synced here perfectly.
trans-unit.source: All your steps, gym sessions, and Apple Watch workouts are synced here perfectly.
trans-unit.note: A description of how the app synchronizes users' health data.
trans-unit.target: Здесь идеально синхронизируются все ваши шаги, занятия в тренажерном зале и тренировки на Apple Watch.

trans-unit.note: The tab label for the analytics section.
A placeholder text indicating that data is being analyzed.
Экран настроек Apple Health.

trans-unit.id: Are you sure you want to break your fast? You've done great so far!
trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to break your fast? You've done great so far!
trans-unit.target: Ты уверен, что хочешь прервать голодание? Ты отлично справляешься!

trans-unit.note: A prompt displayed to the user when the chat history is empty, encouraging them to ask their coach a question.
A title for the section that shows the balance between calories eaten and burned.
A description of the user's nutrition settings being balanced.
A heading for the basic information section of the add ingredient modal.
A section header for body metrics in the edit profile sheet.

trans-unit.id: Bone broth or a light salad first. Your digestive system is asleep, wake it up gently.
trans-unit.source: Bone broth or a light salad first. Your digestive system is asleep, wake it up gently.
trans-unit.target: Сначала костный бульон или легкий салат. Ваша пищеварительная система спит, осторожно разбудите ее.

trans-unit.id: Break it with lean protein (chicken/fish) and veggies. Avoid heavy carbs immediately.
trans-unit.source: Break it with lean protein (chicken/fish) and veggies. Avoid heavy carbs immediately.
trans-unit.target: Добавьте в него нежирный белок (курица/рыба) и овощи. Немедленно избегайте тяжелых углеводов.

trans-unit.note: A section header that says "Browse by Calories".

trans-unit.id: Build healthy habits, understand your body, and achieve your goals with our science-backed guides.
trans-unit.source: Build healthy habits, understand your body, and achieve your goals with our science-backed guides.
trans-unit.note: A description of the benefits of using the app.
trans-unit.target: Выработайте здоровые привычки, изучите свое тело и достигните своих целей с помощью наших научно обоснованных руководств.

trans-unit.note: The title of a view that shows the user how many calories they burn from different activities.

trans-unit.id: Calculating your optimal macros... Preparing your AI Coach.
trans-unit.source: Calculating your optimal macros... Preparing your AI Coach.
trans-unit.target: Вычисление оптимальных макросов... Подготовка вашего AI-тренера.

trans-unit.note: Значение на оси X - день недели

trans-unit.id: Can I eat pizza tonight? How to get more protein? Ask anything.
trans-unit.source: Can I eat pizza tonight? How to get more protein? Ask anything.
trans-unit.note: A description of what the user can ask the AI Coach.
trans-unit.target: Могу ли я съесть пиццу сегодня вечером? Как получить больше белка? Спросите что угодно.

trans-unit.note: A button that dismisses the current view without saving any data.
Label for the "Carbs" slice in the nutrition settings editor chart
A label displayed next to a picker for selecting a recipe category.

trans-unit.id: Choose a schedule to optimize your metabolism and reach your goals faster.
trans-unit.source: Choose a schedule to optimize your metabolism and reach your goals faster.
trans-unit.target: Выберите график, чтобы оптимизировать метаболизм и быстрее достичь своих целей.

trans-unit.note: A description below the main title of the view.

trans-unit.id: Circadian rhythm fast. Great for beginners.
trans-unit.source: Circadian rhythm fast. Great for beginners.
trans-unit.target: Циркадный ритм быстрый. Отлично подходит для новичков.

trans-unit.note: A button to clear all completed items from the shopping list.
A button to dismiss the current view.
A description of the feature that allows users to create custom recipes by combining ingredients and calculating their nutritional information.
A title for the section of the view that displays a user's food intake consistency over a period of time.
A button label that says "Continue" when on the first step of the create recipe wizard.

trans-unit.id: Cooking instructions are not available for this recipe yet.
trans-unit.source: Cooking instructions are not available for this recipe yet.
trans-unit.target: Инструкции по приготовлению для этого рецепта пока недоступны.

trans-unit.note: A label describing the cooking time of a recipe.
A button label that says "Create Custom Recipe".
A title and a subtitle within the active fasting card, displaying the name of the current fast plan and the name of the current fast phase.
The title of the view where a user can create a custom ingredient.

trans-unit.id: DANGER: Do not break with heavy carbs. Start with bone broth, wait an hour, eat steamed veggies and fish.
trans-unit.source: DANGER: Do not break with heavy carbs. Start with bone broth, wait an hour, eat steamed veggies and fish.
trans-unit.target: ОПАСНО: Не злоупотребляйте тяжелыми углеводами. Начните с костного бульона, подождите час, ешьте приготовленные на пару овощи и рыбу.

trans-unit.note: A label describing the average number of calories consumed per day.
A description of what the "Daily Caloric Intake" label refers to.
A label above the slider that adjusts the user's daily calorie intake.
A button label that opens a view for logging daily meals
A title for the section that displays the user's daily macronutrient goals.
The title of the section that shows the user's daily notes.
Значения для оси X - дата
A text field where the user can describe a step in the directions.
A button label that disconnects the app from Apple Health.
A button label that encourages the user to drink water.
A placeholder text in the text field where a user can input ingredients they have in their fridge.
A label indicating that a fasting plan is for experts.

trans-unit.id: Ease your way into fasting. Burns fat smoothly.
trans-unit.source: Ease your way into fasting. Burns fat smoothly.
trans-unit.target: Облегчите свой путь к посту. Плавно сжигает жир.

trans-unit.id: Eat a massive, nutrient-dense meal. Make sure to hit your daily protein and fat macros in this window!
trans-unit.source: Eat a massive, nutrient-dense meal. Make sure to hit your daily protein and fat macros in this window!
trans-unit.target: Ешьте обильно и богато питательными веществами. Обязательно укажите в этом окне ежедневные макросы белка и жира!

trans-unit.note: "Eaten" is a placeholder for a more descriptive name of the value being measured in this context.

trans-unit.id: Eliminates all animal products. Excellent for environmental sustainability and can improve digestion.
trans-unit.source: Eliminates all animal products. Excellent for environmental sustainability and can improve digestion.
trans-unit.target: Исключает все продукты животного происхождения. Отлично подходит для экологической устойчивости и может улучшить пищеварение.

trans-unit.note: A label for the user to input their email address.
A confirmation alert title.
A label displayed above the text field for entering today's weight.
A label describing the estimated protein content of a recommended dish.
A warning displayed to experts about the extended fasting protocol.

trans-unit.id: Extended fasting depletes essential minerals. You MUST consume electrolytes (Sodium, Potassium, Magnesium) dissolved in water to avoid headaches, cramps, and heart palpitations.
trans-unit.source: Extended fasting depletes essential minerals. You MUST consume electrolytes (Sodium, Potassium, Magnesium) dissolved in water to avoid headaches, cramps, and heart palpitations.
trans-unit.note: A description of the warning for experts about the importance of consuming electrolytes during extended fasting.
trans-unit.target: Длительное голодание истощает необходимые минералы. Вы ДОЛЖНЫ употреблять электролиты (натрий, калий, магний), растворенные в воде, чтобы избежать головных болей, судорог и учащенного сердцебиения.

trans-unit.note: A section header that instructs the user to log their calorie intake quickly.
A title for the fasting protocols section of the dashboard.
Name of a macronutrient
A title for the filter sheet.

trans-unit.id: Final review. Check your recipe details before saving.
trans-unit.source: Final review. Check your recipe details before saving.
trans-unit.target: Финальная проверка. Проверь детали рецепта перед сохранением.

trans-unit.note: A placeholder text for a search bar in the recipes container view.
A title for the section that shows a trend of the user's fluid intake.

trans-unit.id: Focus heavily on hydration and electrolytes on your fasting days.
trans-unit.source: Focus heavily on hydration and electrolytes on your fasting days.
trans-unit.target: В дни голодания уделяйте особое внимание гидратации и электролитам.

trans-unit.id: FoodTracker AI provides general nutritional information. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
trans-unit.source: FoodTracker AI provides general nutritional information. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
trans-unit.target: FoodTracker AI предоставляет общую информацию о питании. Оно не заменяет профессиональную медицинскую консультацию, диагностику или лечение.

trans-unit.id: FoodTracker AI provides general nutritional information. Not medical advice.
trans-unit.source: FoodTracker AI provides general nutritional information. Not medical advice.
trans-unit.target: FoodTracker AI предоставляет общую информацию о питании. Не медицинский совет.

trans-unit.note: The tab label for the "Foods" tab in the main view.

trans-unit.id: Forces your body to burn fat for fuel instead of carbohydrates. Effective for rapid fat loss but requires strict adherence.
trans-unit.source: Forces your body to burn fat for fuel instead of carbohydrates. Effective for rapid fat loss but requires strict adherence.
trans-unit.target: Заставляет ваше тело сжигать жир в качестве топлива вместо углеводов. Эффективен для быстрой потери жира, но требует строгого соблюдения.

trans-unit.note: A title for the section that allows the user to generate recipes based on the ingredients they have in their fridge.
A label displayed on the chart indicating the user's daily caloric intake goal.
A horizontal dashed line indicating the user's daily caloric goal.
A label displaying the user's daily calorie goal. The argument is the user's calorie goal.
Label for the y-axis in the macros chart.

trans-unit.id: Great job hitting your targets today!
trans-unit.source: Great job hitting your targets today!
trans-unit.target: Отличная работа по достижению ваших целей сегодня!

trans-unit.id: Healthy breakfast with oats, berries, and almonds
trans-unit.source: Healthy breakfast with oats, berries, and almonds
trans-unit.target: Здоровый завтрак с овсом, ягодами и миндалем

trans-unit.note: A stepper that allows the user to select their height in centimeters.

trans-unit.id: Here you can plug in your real Apple Sign In flow.
trans-unit.source: Here you can plug in your real Apple Sign In flow.
trans-unit.note: A message displayed in an alert when signing in with Apple.
trans-unit.target: Здесь вы можете подключить свой настоящий процесс входа в Apple.

trans-unit.id: Here you can plug in your real Google Sign In flow.
trans-unit.source: Here you can plug in your real Google Sign In flow.
trans-unit.note: A message displayed in an alert when signing in with Google.
trans-unit.target: Здесь вы можете подключить свой реальный процесс входа в Google.
С высоким содержанием жиров и чрезвычайно низким содержанием углеводов

trans-unit.note: The label for the "Home" tab in the tab view.

trans-unit.id: How much time do you want to spend cooking?
trans-unit.source: How much time do you want to spend cooking?
trans-unit.target: Сколько времени вы хотите потратить на готовку?

trans-unit.note: A prompt displayed in the "Daily Notes" card when it's empty.

trans-unit.id: If every day was exactly like today.
trans-unit.source: If every day was exactly like today.
trans-unit.note: A description under the projected weight change, explaining that the weight change is projected based on the user's current calorie deficit or surplus.
trans-unit.target: Если бы каждый день был таким же, как сегодня.

trans-unit.note: A button label that switches the app from metric to imperial units.

trans-unit.id: Inspired by traditional eating habits of Italy and Greece. Great for cardiovascular health.
trans-unit.source: Inspired by traditional eating habits of Italy and Greece. Great for cardiovascular health.
trans-unit.target: Вдохновлен традиционными гастрономическими привычками Италии и Греции. Отлично подходит для здоровья сердечно-сосудистой системы.

trans-unit.id: It's best to track your measurements on the same day each week, at the same time and under the same circumstances.
trans-unit.source: It's best to track your measurements on the same day each week, at the same time and under the same circumstances.
trans-unit.note: A description under the "Weight-in" toggle, explaining the importance of tracking weights at the same time each week.
trans-unit.target: Лучше всего отслеживать свои измерения в один и тот же день каждую неделю, в одно и то же время и при одних и тех же обстоятельствах.

trans-unit.id: Items created here are permanently saved to your database and can be used in your daily logs.
trans-unit.source: Items created here are permanently saved to your database and can be used in your daily logs.
trans-unit.note: A description below the form that explains that the ingredients created here are saved permanently and can be used in the user's daily logs.
trans-unit.target: Созданные здесь элементы навсегда сохраняются в вашей базе данных и могут использоваться в ваших ежедневных журналах.

trans-unit.note: A button label that allows the user to jump to today's date.

trans-unit.id: Keep it up! You're doing great.
trans-unit.source: Keep it up! You're doing great.
trans-unit.note: A message encouraging the user to continue their healthy habits.
trans-unit.target: Так держать! У тебя все отлично.

trans-unit.note: An abbreviation for "liter".
A label displayed below the days of the week in the heatmap.
A button label that says "Learn more".
Label for the y-axis in the water intake trend chart.
A text that appears while waiting for diet plans to be loaded from the server.
A placeholder text displayed while waiting for the user's profile data to load.
A message displayed while loading the academy content.
A call-to-action text that appears when a user's weight is not yet logged.
A message displayed when a user's meal distribution is empty, prompting them to log food.
A button label that logs the user out of their account.

trans-unit.id: Low protein if not planned properly
trans-unit.source: Low protein if not planned properly
trans-unit.target: Низкий уровень белка, если не запланировано должным образом

trans-unit.note: A title for the macro-balance chart.
A label for magnesium in the expert safety warning.
A label describing the main source of calories consumed.

trans-unit.id: Maximizes muscle synthesis. Keeps you feeling full longer and supports recovery.
trans-unit.source: Maximizes muscle synthesis. Keeps you feeling full longer and supports recovery.
trans-unit.target: Максимизирует мышечный синтез. Сохраняет чувство сытости дольше и способствует восстановлению.

trans-unit.note: A label for a picker that lets the user select a meal.
A section header that describes the details of a meal.
A title for the view that shows the distribution of meals based on the user's food intake.
A picker allowing the user to select the type of meal they are logging.
A toggle switch for enabling or disabling meal reminders.
The title of the section that shows a breakdown of the user's daily meals.
The title of a view that shows the user's daily micronutrient intake.

trans-unit.id: Monk Fast. Full day water fast for a reset.
trans-unit.source: Monk Fast. Full day water fast for a reset.
trans-unit.target: Монах Фаст. Полный день на воде для перезагрузки.

trans-unit.note: A message displayed when there are no more recipes to show in a category.
A label displayed above the user's custom recipes.
A label displayed next to the user's name field
A label showing the net calories (difference between calories eaten and calories burned). The value is shown in kcal.
A message displayed when a user has not interacted with the app's chat feature yet.

trans-unit.id: No favorites yet. Tap the star icon on any recipe to save it here.
trans-unit.source: No favorites yet. Tap the star icon on any recipe to save it here.
trans-unit.target: Избранных пока нет. Нажми на звёздочку у любого рецепта, чтобы сохранить его здесь.
trans-unit.note: A message displayed when a user has no favorite recipes. It encourages the user to save recipes by tapping the star icon.
A message displayed when a user tries to log a meal but hasn't added any food items yet.
A message displayed when a user has not logged any foods yet.

trans-unit.id: No worries! You can quickly add it to your personal database and use it forever.
trans-unit.source: No worries! You can quickly add it to your personal database and use it forever.
trans-unit.target: Не беспокойся! Ты можешь быстро добавить его в свою личную базу данных и использовать всегда.

trans-unit.id: Note: The recipe name must be at least 3 characters long.
trans-unit.source: Note: The recipe name must be at least 3 characters long.
trans-unit.target: Примечание: Название рецепта должно быть не менее 3 символов.
trans-unit.note: A note displayed below the text field for the recipe name, explaining that the name must be at least 3 characters long.
A label describing the number of servings in a recipe.
A heading for the nutrition section of the dashboard.
The title of the section that displays the user's daily macronutrient intake per serving size.
The title of the nutrition settings view.

trans-unit.id: Oatmeal with berries or a protein smoothie will keep you energized.
trans-unit.source: Oatmeal with berries or a protein smoothie will keep you energized.
trans-unit.target: Овсянка с ягодами или протеиновый коктейль зарядят вас энергией.

trans-unit.id: On your 500 kcal days, focus entirely on lean protein and leafy greens to stay full.
trans-unit.source: On your 500 kcal days, focus entirely on lean protein and leafy greens to stay full.
trans-unit.target: В дни, когда вы потребляете 500 ккал, полностью сосредоточьтесь на нежирном белке и листовой зелени, чтобы оставаться сытыми.

trans-unit.id: One Meal A Day. Extreme fat burn and repair.
trans-unit.source: One Meal A Day. Extreme fat burn and repair.
trans-unit.target: Один прием пищи в день. Экстремальное сжигание и восстановление жира.

trans-unit.id: One day on, one day off. Breaks plateaus.
trans-unit.source: One day on, one day off. Breaks plateaus.
trans-unit.target: Один рабочий день, один выходной. Разбивает плато.

trans-unit.note: A label that indicates that the nutrition facts are optional.
A label displayed below the quick calorie entry block, encouraging the user to log a detailed meal.
A set of nutritional values for a food item, displayed in a small text block below the item's name.
A label indicating that a fasting plan is popular.
A heading for a section of the macro fix result sheet that lists recommended snacks.
A section header in the edit profile sheet, describing personal details.
A title for the section where users can filter recipes by meal type.

trans-unit.id: Please update to the latest version to continue.
trans-unit.source: Please update to the latest version to continue.
trans-unit.target: Пожалуйста, обновитесь до последней версии, чтобы продолжить.
Протеиновый коктейль для восстановления после тренировки

trans-unit.note: A label for potassium in the expert safety warning.
Заголовок окна профиля
A label displayed above the projected weight change.
A title for the Quick Add sheet.
A button that resets all filter selections.
A button that saves the meal and dismisses the view. It is only enabled when there are food items selected.
A button label that saves a new ingredient and allows the user to add another one.
A button label that saves a user's recipe.
A button label that saves the user's weight input.
A button label that triggers a search for ingredients.

trans-unit.id: Search our global database or create your own custom ingredients.
trans-unit.source: Search our global database or create your own custom ingredients.
trans-unit.target: Выполните поиск в нашей глобальной базе данных или создайте свои собственные ингредиенты.

trans-unit.note: A button that, when tapped, filters the list of recipes based on the selected filters. The button's text changes to "No Recipes Found" if no recipes match the selected filters, or to "See X
A button label that says "Select".
A label displayed in the top-left corner of the calendar sheet, indicating that the user can select a date
A label describing the serving size of a food item.
The title of the settings screen.
The title of the screen where users can manage their shopping list.
A button that triggers an alert for signing in with Apple.
A button that triggers a Google Sign In flow.
A description below the title of the section that shows the user's total calories consumed since their first entry.
A label describing the standard serving size of a recipe.

trans-unit.id: Start logging meals to build your streak.
trans-unit.source: Start logging meals to build your streak.
trans-unit.note: A description below the streak count, encouraging users to start logging meals.
trans-unit.target: Начните записывать приемы пищи, чтобы построить свою серию.

trans-unit.id: Start with a small portion of easily digestible food, wait 30 mins, then eat a full meal.
trans-unit.source: Start with a small portion of easily digestible food, wait 30 mins, then eat a full meal.
trans-unit.target: Начните с небольшой порции легкоусвояемой пищи, подождите 30 минут, затем съешьте полноценный обед.

trans-unit.id: Sync nutrition, activity and body measurement with Apple Health app. Data from Apple Health will help give you more accurate recommendations.
trans-unit.source: Sync nutrition, activity and body measurement with Apple Health app. Data from Apple Health will help give you more accurate recommendations.
trans-unit.note: A description under the "Sync with Apple Health" section, explaining how Apple Health data can be used to provide more accurate health recommendations.
trans-unit.target: Синхронизируйте данные о питании, активности и фигуре с приложением Apple Health. Данные Apple Health помогут дать вам более точные рекомендации.

trans-unit.note: A title for the section that allows users to sync their health data with Apple Health.
A section header describing the tags and mood selection options.

trans-unit.id: Tap a nutrient to see top sources
trans-unit.source: Tap a nutrient to see top sources
trans-unit.note: A description below the fitness rings card, instructing the user to tap on a nutrient to see its top food sources.
trans-unit.target: Нажмите на питательное вещество, чтобы увидеть лучшие источники.

trans-unit.id: Tell me what you have, and I'll generate a recipe that perfectly fits your remaining calories.
trans-unit.source: Tell me what you have, and I'll generate a recipe that perfectly fits your remaining calories.
trans-unit.note: A description under the "Fridge to Recipe" section, explaining the feature.
trans-unit.target: Скажите мне, что у вас есть, и я подготовлю рецепт, который идеально соответствует вашим оставшимся калориям.

trans-unit.id: The Warrior Diet. 1-2 meals in a tight window.
trans-unit.source: The Warrior Diet. 1-2 meals in a tight window.
trans-unit.target: Диета воина. 1-2-разовое питание в тесном окне.

trans-unit.id: The golden standard of fasting. Perfect for fat loss.
trans-unit.source: The golden standard of fasting. Perfect for fat loss.
trans-unit.target: Золотой стандарт поста. Идеально подходит для похудения.

trans-unit.id: This is optimized based on your profile goals. Feel free to adjust it manually.
trans-unit.source: This is optimized based on your profile goals. Feel free to adjust it manually.
trans-unit.target: Это оптимизировано в зависимости от целей вашего профиля. Не стесняйтесь настраивать его вручную.

trans-unit.note: A section header that lists the number of items still to be purchased.
A title at the top of the view, describing the type of macronutrient (e.g. "Top Protein Sources"). The argument is the name of the macronutrient.
A description of what the "Total Food Logged Today" label means.
Key path to use for identifying and styling different data series in a chart.
A placeholder text in the input field of the food chat interface.
The title of the settings screen related to units.

trans-unit.id: Updating these metrics will automatically recalculate your recommended daily calorie goal.
trans-unit.source: Updating these metrics will automatically recalculate your recommended daily calorie goal.
trans-unit.note: A footer text in the "Edit Profile" sheet that explains the impact of changing body metrics on the user's daily calorie goal.
trans-unit.target: Обновление этих показателей автоматически пересчитает рекомендуемую дневную цель по калориям.

trans-unit.note: A title for a section that lists the user's daily vitamin and mineral intake.
A toggle switch for enabling or disabling water reminders.

trans-unit.id: Water and meals reminders adapt to your habits. Keep using the app and times will be personalized.
trans-unit.source: Water and meals reminders adapt to your habits. Keep using the app and times will be personalized.
trans-unit.note: A description under the toggle switches in the Reminders Settings View, explaining how the times for meals and water are adjusted based on the user's habits.

trans-unit.id: Water maintains blood volume, flushes out excess sodium, and keeps your body's pH perfectly balanced.
trans-unit.source: Water maintains blood volume, flushes out excess sodium, and keeps your body's pH perfectly balanced.

trans-unit.id: We need your baseline to calculate macros.
trans-unit.source: We need your baseline to calculate macros.

trans-unit.note: The title of the section that shows the user's accumulated caloric deficit over the past week.
"Weight" is a placeholder for a more appropriate translation.
A description of a weight gain zone.
A heading for the weight impact section of the view.
A title for a weight loss zone in the "Weight Impact" card.
A title for the weight progress section of the weight tracker card.
A toggle that allows the user to enable or disable weight-in reminders.
A stepper control that allows the user to select a weight in kilograms. The argument is the string “%.1f”.

trans-unit.id: Write about your meals, feelings, or workouts...
trans-unit.source: Write about your meals, feelings, or workouts...

trans-unit.id: You are in a calorie deficit.
trans-unit.source: You are in a calorie deficit.
trans-unit.note: A description of the user's weight loss status.

trans-unit.id: You are in a calorie surplus.
trans-unit.source: You are in a calorie surplus.

trans-unit.id: You've accumulated a surplus this week.
trans-unit.source: You've accumulated a surplus this week.
trans-unit.note: A description of the user's weekly energy bank if they've accumulated a surplus of calories.

trans-unit.id: You've saved enough for a 0.5kg weight loss!
trans-unit.source: You've saved enough for a 0.5kg weight loss!
trans-unit.note: A message displayed below the weekly energy bank card, encouraging the user to maintain a healthy lifestyle.

trans-unit.id: Your body is a reflection of your nutrition. Take control of your diet and achieve your dreams.
trans-unit.source: Your body is a reflection of your nutrition. Take control of your diet and achieve your dreams.

trans-unit.id: Your body uses 'Burned' energy to process 'Eaten' food.
trans-unit.source: Your body uses 'Burned' energy to process 'Eaten' food.

trans-unit.note: A description of the AI Coach app.
An abbreviation for "calories".
A small label below a product name that indicates where it was added from. The argument is the name of the recipe from which the product was added.
A description of weight gain per week.
A unit of measurement for calories.
A label displayed below the number of calories burned.
A label describing the number of calories consumed.
A unit of measurement for weight.
A description of the weight change projected over a week.
A footer label displaying the version of the app.
A label displaying the estimated number of calories in a recommended dish. The argument is the estimated number of calories in the recommended dish.

trans-unit.id: Алгоритм использует эти данные для точного расчета BMR (базового обмена веществ) и твоей дневной нормы макронутриентов.
trans-unit.source: Алгоритм использует эти данные для точного расчета BMR (базового обмена веществ) и твоей дневной нормы макронутриентов.
trans-unit.note: A description under the wheel columns in the MetricsScreen, explaining how the app calculates your Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) and daily macronutrient needs.
A description under the main title of the screen.
A button label that says "Sign In".
A title for a view that lets users log in as a guest.
A button label that says "Guest".

trans-unit.id: Если остаться гостем, данные о вашем питании, калориях и водном балансе не будут сохраняться в облаке. При смене устройства вы потеряете дневник.
trans-unit.source: Если остаться гостем, данные о вашем питании, калориях и водном балансе не будут сохраняться в облаке. При смене устройства вы потеряете дневник.
trans-unit.note: A description of what happens if a user stays as a guest.

trans-unit.id: Заполни данные, чтобы сохранить свой прогресс в питании и получить персональные рекомендации.
trans-unit.source: Заполни данные, чтобы сохранить свой прогресс в питании и получить персональные рекомендации.
trans-unit.note: A description below the text fields in the Google registration view, instructing users to fill in their information to track their diet progress and receive personalized recommendations.
A button label that says "Register".
The title of the view that guides the user through the process of cooking a recipe using an AI chef.
The title of the AI Assistant feature on the main screen of the AI Chef Studio.
A label for the user's full name text field.
A section header that translates to "Art of Serving" in English.
A section header for the historical and factual information of a recipe.

trans-unit.id: Мы — это то, что мы едим и пьем. Начни свой путь к осознанному питанию, следи за водным балансом и наполняй тело витаминами каждый день. Твое здоровье — твоя главная инвестиция!
trans-unit.source: Мы — это то, что мы едим и пьем. Начни свой путь к осознанному питанию, следи за водным балансом и наполняй тело витаминами каждый день. Твое здоровье — твоя главная инвестиция!
trans-unit.note: A description of the app's features and benefits.

trans-unit.id: Нажимая «Зарегистрироваться», вы принимаете условия использования и политику конфиденциальности.
trans-unit.source: Нажимая «Зарегистрироваться», вы принимаете условия использования и политику конфиденциальности.
trans-unit.note: A text displayed below the "Зарегистрироваться" button, outlining the app's usage terms and privacy policy.
A button label that translates to "Back" in English.
A title displayed in the center of the view.
A call-to-action text that encourages users to try cooking with an AI assistant.
A button label that allows users to continue without logging in.

trans-unit.id: Отметь, что у тебя есть на столе
trans-unit.source: Отметь, что у тебя есть на столе

trans-unit.note: A title for the screen that asks users to estimate themselves.
A label for a password field.
A title displayed in the FinishScreen.
A button that dismisses the camera scanner view when pressed.
A heading that explains why it's better to register.
A button label that appears when the user has not yet checked off all the ingredients.
A title displayed in the center of the view.

trans-unit.id: Сколько энергии ты тратишь в течение дня?
trans-unit.source: Сколько энергии ты тратишь в течение дня?
trans-unit.note: A description under the title "Твой ритм", explaining that the user needs to select their daily energy expenditure.
A title that translates to "Your Pure Fuel" in English.

trans-unit.id:
Твой персональный нутрициолог. Никаких жестких диет и голодовок — только умный подход к телу и балансу энергии.
Готов изменить себя изнутри?
trans-unit.source:
Твой персональный нутрициолог. Никаких жестких диет и голодовок — только умный подход к телу и балансу энергии.
Готов изменить себя изнутри?
trans-unit.note: A description of the welcome screen, explaining the app's purpose and encouraging users to start.
A title displayed at the top of the screen.

trans-unit.id:
Твоя суточная норма калорий и макронутриентов успешно рассчитана.
Добро пожаловать в лучшую версию себя.
trans-unit.source:
Твоя суточная норма калорий и макронутриентов успешно рассчитана.
Добро пожаловать в лучшую версию себя.
trans-unit.note: A description of the benefits of using the app, displayed below the title.
A non-breaking hyphen used in the UI.
A text indicating that a food item is not recommended for a user's active diet. The argument is the name of the user's active diet.
A small label indicating that a food is perfect for a user's active diet. The argument is the name of the user's active diet.
A small text displaying the macronutrient content of an ingredient.
A placeholder emoji and text displayed when a user hasn't added a daily note or mood emoji yet.
An emoji representing rain.
Эмотиконка "кухня"
